markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore Kathy's potential fit for a role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has two hiring needs: a Director to standardize its dev tool client playbook and a GTM lead to unify marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Kathy is a strong candidate due to her technical background (ex-GrowthBook) and PMM experience, which aligns with both roles.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [GrowthX is building a product to compete with SEMrush and Ahrefs, leveraging its agency work to gain a competitive edge.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [The hiring process is active; Kathy will interview with other team members via Zoom before meeting Marcel in person.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Vision & Strategy

  - [**Core Mission:** Improve knowledge work for non-technical people.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**Dual Model:** An agency (GrowthX) and a product company (unnamed competitor to SEMrush/Ahrefs).](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Competitive Edge:** The agency model provides real-world experience, enabling GrowthX to build a more effective product than tool-only companies.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [**GTM Strategy:** A "detached brand" evangelizes AI/growth, serving as an organic marketing vehicle for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Hiring Need 1: Director (Delivery)

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX lacks a repeatable model for its dev tool clients (e.g., Webflow, Strapi), and the team has limited technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**Role:** A Director to act as a strategic counterpart to client founders/CMOs.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Define and standardize client playbooks (e.g., QBRs).](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Own a portfolio of dev tool accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Team Structure:** Director → Account Strategist → Managing Editor.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Hiring Need 2: GTM Lead

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX's marketing efforts (community, events, demand gen) are siloed and need a unified strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Role:** A GTM lead to create connective tissue between all marketing lanes.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Drive marketing strategy and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Unify community, events, and demand gen.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Kathy's Background & Fit

  - [**Status:** Left GrowthBook; now consulting and building Spivit (an event meeting-setup tool).](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Fit for Director:** Technical background and PMM experience make Kathy well-suited to manage dev tool clients and push back strategically.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Fit for GTM Lead:** PMM skills are valuable for building a "publication machine" to turn expert knowledge into content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=2131.0)
  - [**Shared Vision:** Kathy proposed an AI agent to automate content creation from product artifacts (e.g., PRDs), aligning with GrowthX's product vision.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kathy:**](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [Consider the Director role and prepare questions.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [Update LinkedIn profile.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
      - [Schedule Zoom interviews for Kathy with other GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
      - [Introduce Kathy to Marcel in person after her trip.](https://fathom.video/share/HRVQ4hoktzwkLPo-xo45rU29Ud9HyAtp?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
